title: Define ES outcome ontology + data dictionary v0.1
context: Harmonizing Ewing Sarcoma outcomes requires a shared controlled vocabulary so that event definitions (EFS/RFS/DFS/OS), disease extent, risk groups, regimen backbones, local-control modality, and treatment era are encoded consistently rather than coerced. This task turns the schema (eoh-schema-001) into a human-readable ontology and data dictionary v0.1 that downstream extractors follow. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Author the Ewing outcome ontology and data dictionary v0.1: every controlled vocabulary term defined with its source framing, every schema field documented with definition, allowed values, and extraction rationale.
acceptanceCriteria: Every enum field from the schema (disease_extent, primary_site, age_band, risk_group, regimen_backbone, local_control, outcome_measure, event_definition, estimate_method, source_license, comparability_flags) has a defined controlled vocabulary with term-level definitions.
Each term records the original source framing it maps from; ambiguous or non-mappable labels are flagged rather than silently coerced.
Data dictionary v0.1 documents every schema field with definition, type, allowed values, and extraction guidance.
Ontology and dictionary reviewed and signed by a domain (sarcoma-oncology / clinical-epidemiology) reviewer.
output: /output/ontology/ewing-outcome-ontology-v0.1.md plus a controlled-vocabulary reference, committed to the repo.
